shaman.fantasy: The Fallen Shaman keeps reviving its imps — every imp you cut down rises again moments later.
shaman.real: Recurring test failures from ONE root cause: fix a symptom and they come back; kill the root and the whole class dies at once.

dispel.fantasy: The hero dispels a mirage — a conjured illusion shatters to reveal the true terrain beneath.
dispel.real: The agent assumed something, then read the code to CHECK, and dropped the wrong assumption. Verifying beats guessing.

summon.fantasy: The hero summons the Eidolon THUNDORR for one decisive blow.
summon.real: Spawning a sub-agent (the Task tool) to land the breakthrough fix after a long struggle.

melee.fantasy: A hammer strike — a forge blow that chips the enemy's armor.
melee.real: A code edit (the Edit/Write tools) that chips away at the problem's integrity.

spell.fantasy: A channeled spell, drawn out then released.
spell.real: Running the tests/build/lint (pnpm test/build/lint) — it opens the decisive strike.

scout.fantasy: Scouting the terrain before the advance.
scout.real: Reading the code (the Read/Grep/Glob tools) to check the ground before acting.

aetherStorm.fantasy: An Aether Storm rolls in — the party waits out the storm, then presses on.
aetherStorm.real: An environmental pause (a rate limit / 529 / backoff), NOT the hero's failure.
